before_code:
module flip_flop_controller (
  input clk,
  input rst_n,
  input enable,
  input [7:0] d,
  output reg [7:0] q
);

  always @(posedge clk) begin
    if (~rst_n) begin
      q <= 8'b0;
    end else if (enable) begin
      q <= d;
    end
  end

endmodule
after_code:
module flip_flop_controller (
  input clk,
  input rst_n,
  input enable,
  input [7:0] d,
  output reg [7:0] q
);

  always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
    if (~rst_n) begin
      q <= 8'b0;
    end else if (enable) begin
      q <= d;
    end
  end

endmodule
